candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears as a component within the selected parent row 'Cost of revenues/COGS', alongside other COGS subcomponents. Adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

This appears beneath 'Administrative costs' as a component of that selected parent bucket, so it is already embedded in the chosen XSGA_COMPONENTS rows and should not be added separately.

This appears beneath 'Research and development costs' as a component of that selected parent bucket. This belongs to COGS, not SG&A/XSGA, so it is not relevant to the selected XSGA bucket.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the sum of 'Sales and marketing costs', 'Administrative costs', and 'Research and development costs'. The visible D&A rows sit as sub-components under those selected rows rather than as separate same-level operating lines. Therefore no separate XSGA D&A row should be added.
